Quality Education.reasoning: As a university-level course, it aims to equip students with knowledge and critical thinking skills to understand and communicate environmental and health risks, aligning with Target 4.7 on education for sustainable development.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reasoning: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to decent work, economic growth, or employment.

Reduced Inequalities.reasoning: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to reducing inequalities in income, social inclusion, or discrimination.
